member.name: T:Iot.Device.Modbus.Client.ModbusClient
member.summary: Represents a Modbus client that communicates with a Modbus device over a serial port.

member.name: M:Iot.Device.Modbus.Client.ModbusClient.#ctor(System.String,System.Int32,System.IO.Ports.Parity,System.Int32,System.IO.Ports.StopBits,System.IO.Ports.SerialMode)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class with the specified port settings.
member.param: The name of the serial port.
The baud rate. Default is 9600.
The parity. Default is .
The number of data bits. Default is 8.
The number of stop bits. Default is .
The mode of serial port, default is .

member.name: M:Iot.Device.Modbus.Client.ModbusClient.#ctor(System.IO.Ports.SerialPort,System.IO.Ports.SerialMode)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class with the specified serial port.
member.param: The serial port.
The mode of serial port, default is .

member.name: M:Iot.Device.Modbus.Client.ModbusClient.ReadDiscreteInputs(System.Byte,System.UInt16,System.UInt16)
member.summary: Reads the values of discrete inputs from the Modbus device.
member.param: The device ID.
The starting address of the inputs.
The number of inputs to read.
member.returns: An array of boolean values representing the state of the discrete inputs or a if the read operation fails.
member.exception: Thrown when , , or is out of range.

member.name: M:Iot.Device.Modbus.Client.ModbusClient.ReadInputRegisters(System.Byte,System.UInt16,System.UInt16)
member.summary: Reads the values of input registers from the Modbus device.
member.param: The device ID.
The starting address of the registers.
The number of registers to read.
member.returns: An array of values representing the values of the holding registers or a if the read operation fails.
member.exception: Thrown when , , or is out of range.

member.name: M:Iot.Device.Modbus.Client.ModbusClient.ReadCoils(System.Byte,System.UInt16,System.UInt16)
member.summary: Reads the values of coils from the Modbus device.
member.param: The device ID.
The starting address of the coils.
The number of coils to read.
member.returns: An array of boolean values representing the state of the coils or a if the read operation fails.
member.exception: Thrown when , , or is out of range.

member.name: M:Iot.Device.Modbus.Client.ModbusClient.ReadHoldingRegisters(System.Byte,System.UInt16,System.UInt16)
member.summary: Reads the values of holding registers from the Modbus device.
member.param: The device ID.
The starting address of the registers.
The number of registers to read.
member.returns: An array of values representing the values of the holding registers or a if the read operation fails.
member.exception: Thrown when , , or is out of range.

member.name: M:Iot.Device.Modbus.Client.ModbusClient.WriteSingleCoil(System.Byte,System.UInt16,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Writes a single coil value to the Modbus device.
member.param: The device ID.
The address of the coil to write.
The value to write to the coil.
member.returns: if the write operation is successful, otherwise.
member.exception: Thrown when or is out of range.

member.name: M:Iot.Device.Modbus.Client.ModbusClient.WriteSingleRegister(System.Byte,System.UInt16,System.Int16)
member.summary: Writes a single register value to the Modbus device.
member.param: The device ID.
The address of the register to write.
The value to write to the register.
member.returns: if the write operation is successful, otherwise.
member.exception: Thrown when or is out of range.

member.name: M:Iot.Device.Modbus.Client.ModbusClient.WriteMultipleCoils(System.Byte,System.UInt16,System.Boolean[])
member.summary: Writes multiple coil values to the Modbus device.
member.param: The device ID.
The starting address of the coils to write.
An array of boolean values representing the state of the coils to write.
member.returns: if the write operation is successful, otherwise.
member.exception: Thrown when or is out of range, or the length of the array is zero.

member.name: M:Iot.Device.Modbus.Client.ModbusClient.WriteMultipleRegisters(System.Byte,System.UInt16,System.UInt16[])
member.summary: Writes multiple register values to the Modbus device.
member.param: The device ID.
The starting address of the registers to write.
An array of ushort values representing the values to write to the registers.
member.returns: if the write operation is successful, otherwise.
member.exception: Thrown when or is out of range, or the length of the array is zero.

member.name: M:Iot.Device.Modbus.Client.ModbusClient.Raw(System.Byte,Iot.Device.Modbus.FunctionCode,System.Byte[])
member.summary: Sends a raw Modbus request to the device and returns the raw response.
member.param: The device ID.
The Modbus function code.
The raw data of the request.
member.returns: The raw data of the response or a if the operation fails.

member.name: T:Iot.Device.Modbus.Consts
member.summary: Contains protocol constant definitions.

member.name: F:Iot.Device.Modbus.Consts.MinDeviceId
member.summary: The lowest accepted device id on RTU protocol.

member.name: F:Iot.Device.Modbus.Consts.MaxDeviceId
member.summary: The highest accepted device id on RTU protocol.

member.name: F:Iot.Device.Modbus.Consts.MinAddress
member.summary: The lowest address.

member.name: F:Iot.Device.Modbus.Consts.MaxAddress
member.summary: The highest address.

member.name: F:Iot.Device.Modbus.Consts.MinCount
member.summary: The lowest number of requested data sets.

member.name: F:Iot.Device.Modbus.Consts.MaxCoilCountRead
member.summary: The highest number of requested coils to read.

member.name: F:Iot.Device.Modbus.Consts.MaxCoilCountWrite
member.summary: The highest number of requested coils to write.

member.name: F:Iot.Device.Modbus.Consts.MaxRegisterCountRead
member.summary: The highest number of requested registers to read.

member.name: F:Iot.Device.Modbus.Consts.MaxRegisterCountWrite
member.summary: The highest number of requested registers to write.

member.name: F:Iot.Device.Modbus.Consts.ErrorMask
member.summary: The Bit-Mask to filter the error-state of a Modbus response.

member.name: T:Iot.Device.Modbus.FunctionCode
member.summary: Modbus function codes.

member.name: F:Iot.Device.Modbus.FunctionCode.ReadCoils
member.summary: Read coils (Fn 1). 读​​线圈.

member.name: F:Iot.Device.Modbus.FunctionCode.ReadDiscreteInputs
member.summary: Read discrete inputs (Fn 2). 读​​离散​量​输入.

member.name: F:Iot.Device.Modbus.FunctionCode.ReadHoldingRegisters
member.summary: Reads holding registers (Fn 3). 读​​保持寄存器.

member.name: F:Iot.Device.Modbus.FunctionCode.ReadInputRegisters
member.summary: Reads input registers (Fn 4). 读​​输入​寄存器.

member.name: F:Iot.Device.Modbus.FunctionCode.WriteSingleCoil
member.summary: Writes a single coil (Fn 5). 写​​单​个​线圈.

member.name: F:Iot.Device.Modbus.FunctionCode.WriteSingleRegister
member.summary: Writes a single register (Fn 6). 写​​单​个​寄存器.

member.name: F:Iot.Device.Modbus.FunctionCode.Diagnostics
member.summary: Diagnostic (Fn 8). 诊断功能.

member.name: F:Iot.Device.Modbus.FunctionCode.WriteMultipleCoils
member.summary: Writes multiple coils (Fn 15). 写​​多个​线圈.

member.name: F:Iot.Device.Modbus.FunctionCode.WriteMultipleRegisters
member.summary: Writes multiple registers (Fn 16). 写​多个​寄存器.

member.name: F:Iot.Device.Modbus.FunctionCode.EncapsulatedInterface
member.summary: Tunnels service requests and method invocations (Fn 43). 封装接口(MEI).

member.name: T:Iot.Device.Modbus.ErrorCode
member.summary: Modbus error code.

member.name: F:Iot.Device.Modbus.ErrorCode.NoError
member.summary: No error. 无错误.

member.name: F:Iot.Device.Modbus.ErrorCode.IllegalFunction
member.summary: Illegal function. 不​支持​接收​的​功能​码。​要​确认​原始​功能​码，​请​从​返回​值​中​减去​0x80.

member.name: F:Iot.Device.Modbus.ErrorCode.IllegalDataAddress
member.summary: Illegal data address. 请求​尝试​访问​的​地址​无效.

member.name: F:Iot.Device.Modbus.ErrorCode.IllegalDataValue
member.summary: Illegal data value. 请求​包含​不​正确​的​数据.

member.name: F:Iot.Device.Modbus.ErrorCode.SlaveDeviceFailure
member.summary: Slva device failure. 尝试​处理​请求​时​发生​不可​恢复​的​错误. 这​是​一个​常见​异常​码，​表示​请求​有效，​但从​设备​无法​执行​该​请求.

member.name: F:Iot.Device.Modbus.ErrorCode.Acknowledge
member.summary: Acknoledge. 确认。已经接受请求，并且正在处理这个请求，但是需要长持续时间进行这些操作. 返回这个响应防止在客户机（或主站）中发生超时错误.

member.name: F:Iot.Device.Modbus.ErrorCode.SlaveDeviceBusy
member.summary: Slave device busy. 从属设备忙.

member.name: F:Iot.Device.Modbus.ErrorCode.NegativeAcknowledge
member.summary: Negative acknowledge. 对于功能 13 或 14（此器件不支持的）请求，将返回此代码.

member.name: F:Iot.Device.Modbus.ErrorCode.MemoryParityError
member.summary: Memory parity error. 存储奇偶性差错.

member.name: F:Iot.Device.Modbus.ErrorCode.GatewayPath
member.summary: Gateway path. 不可用网关路径.

member.name: F:Iot.Device.Modbus.ErrorCode.GatewayTargetDevice
member.summary: Gateway target device. 网关目标设备无响应.

member.name: T:Iot.Device.Modbus.FunctionCodeExtensions
member.summary: Extensions for .

member.name: M:Iot.Device.Modbus.FunctionCodeExtensions.ToNameString(Iot.Device.Modbus.FunctionCode)
member.summary: Returns the enum member name for a value.
member.param: The value.
member.returns: The name of the enum member if defined; otherwise, the numeric value as a string.

member.name: T:Iot.Device.Modbus.Port
member.summary: Represents a serial port used for Modbus communication.

member.name: P:Iot.Device.Modbus.Port.Logger
member.summary: Gets or sets the logger instance.

member.name: M:Iot.Device.Modbus.Port.Format(System.Byte[])
member.summary: Formats an array of bytes as a string.
member.param: The buffer to format.
member.returns: A string representation of the buffer in hexadecimal format.

member.name: M:Iot.Device.Modbus.Port.#ctor(System.String,System.Int32,System.IO.Ports.Parity,System.Int32,System.IO.Ports.StopBits,System.Int32,System.IO.Ports.SerialMode)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class with the specified port settings.
member.param: The name of the serial port.
The baud rate.
The parity.
The number of data bits.
The number of stop bits.
The number of bytes required before the event is fired. Default is 1.
The mode of serial port, default is .

member.name: M:Iot.Device.Modbus.Port.#ctor(System.IO.Ports.SerialPort,System.Int32,System.IO.Ports.SerialMode)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class with the specified serial port.
member.param: The serial port.
The number of bytes required before the event is fired. Default is 1.
The mode of serial port, default is .

member.name: P:Iot.Device.Modbus.Port.PortName
member.summary: Gets the name of the serial port.

member.name: P:Iot.Device.Modbus.Port.IsOpen
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether the serial port is open.

member.name: P:Iot.Device.Modbus.Port.ReadTimeout
member.summary: Gets or sets the read timeout in milliseconds.

member.name: P:Iot.Device.Modbus.Port.WriteTimeout
member.summary: Gets or sets the write timeout in milliseconds.

member.name: P:Iot.Device.Modbus.Port.ReadBufferSize
member.summary: Gets or sets the size of the input buffer.

member.name: P:Iot.Device.Modbus.Port.WriteBufferSize
member.summary: Gets or sets the size of the output buffer.

member.name: M:Iot.Device.Modbus.Port.CheckOpen
member.summary: Checks if the serial port is open and opens it if necessary.
member.returns: if the serial port is open, otherwise.

member.name: M:Iot.Device.Modbus.Port.DataReceivedHandler(System.Object,System.IO.Ports.SerialDataReceivedEventArgs)
member.summary: Event handler for the serial port event.
member.param: The source of the event.
The instance containing the event data.

member.name: M:Iot.Device.Modbus.Port.DataReceived(System.Int32)
member.summary: Event handler for the DataReceived event.
member.param: The number of bytes available to read.

member.name: M:Iot.Device.Modbus.Port.DataRead
member.summary: Reads a single byte of data from the serial port.
member.returns: The byte read from the serial port.

member.name: M:Iot.Device.Modbus.Port.DataRead(System.Int32)
member.summary: Reads a specified number of bytes from the serial port.
member.param: The number of bytes to read.
member.returns: An array of bytes read from the serial port.

member.name: M:Iot.Device.Modbus.Port.DataWrite(System.Byte)
member.summary: Writes a single byte of data to the serial port.
member.param: The byte to write to the serial port.

member.name: M:Iot.Device.Modbus.Port.DataWrite(System.Byte[],System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Writes a specified number of bytes to the serial port.
member.param: The buffer that contains the data to write.
The zero-based byte offset in the buffer at which to begin writing.
The number of bytes to write.
member.returns: if the write operation was successful, otherwise.

member.name: M:Iot.Device.Modbus.Port.Dispose(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Releases the unmanaged resources used by the serial port and optionally releases the managed resources.
member.param: to release both managed and unmanaged resources; to release only unmanaged resources.

member.name: M:Iot.Device.Modbus.Port.Dispose
member.summary: Releases the resources used by the serial port.

member.name: M:Iot.Device.Modbus.Protocol.Response.SetBit(System.Byte,System.Byte,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Sets the bit at the specified index to the specified value.
member.param: The data.
From left to right: 8,7,6,5,4,3,2,1.
True: 1 and false: 0.
member.returns: The byte set.

member.name: T:Iot.Device.Modbus.Server.ModbusServer
member.summary: Modbus server implementation that listens for Modbus requests and handles them.

member.name: M:Iot.Device.Modbus.Server.ModbusServer.#ctor(Iot.Device.Modbus.Server.ModbusDevice,System.String,System.Int32,System.IO.Ports.Parity,System.Int32,System.IO.Ports.StopBits,System.IO.Ports.SerialMode)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the ModbusServer class with the specified Modbus device and communication parameters.
member.param: The Modbus device.
The name of the serial port.
The baud rate.
The parity.
The number of data bits.
The stop bits.
The mode of serial port, default is RS485.

member.name: M:Iot.Device.Modbus.Server.ModbusServer.#ctor(Iot.Device.Modbus.Server.ModbusDevice,System.IO.Ports.SerialPort,System.IO.Ports.SerialMode)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the ModbusServer class with the specified Modbus device and serial port.
member.param: The Modbus device.
The serial port.
The mode of serial port, default is RS485.

member.name: M:Iot.Device.Modbus.Server.ModbusServer.StartListening
member.summary: Starts listening for Modbus requests on the server.

member.name: M:Iot.Device.Modbus.Server.ModbusServer.DataReceived(System.Int32)
member.summary: Called when data is received on the serial port.
member.param: The number of bytes to read from the serial port.

member.name: T:Iot.Device.Modbus.Server.ModbusDevice
member.summary: Represents a Modbus device.

member.name: M:Iot.Device.Modbus.Server.ModbusDevice.#ctor(System.Byte)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class with the specified device ID.
member.param: The device ID. Default is the minimum device ID.

member.name: P:Iot.Device.Modbus.Server.ModbusDevice.DeviceId
member.summary: Gets or sets the device ID.

member.name: M:Iot.Device.Modbus.Server.ModbusDevice.TryReadDiscreteInput(System.UInt16,System.Boolean@)
member.summary: Tries to read a discrete input from the Modbus device at the specified address.
member.param: The address of the discrete input.
When this method returns, contains the value of the discrete input if the read operation succeeds, or false if the read operation fails.
member.returns: True if the read operation succeeds; otherwise, false.

member.name: M:Iot.Device.Modbus.Server.ModbusDevice.TryReadInputRegister(System.UInt16,System.Int16@)
member.summary: Tries to read an input register from the Modbus device at the specified address.
member.param: The address of the input register.
When this method returns, contains the value of the input register if the read operation succeeds, or zero if the read operation fails.
member.returns: True if the read operation succeeds; otherwise, false.

member.name: M:Iot.Device.Modbus.Server.ModbusDevice.TryReadCoil(System.UInt16,System.Boolean@)
member.summary: Tries to read a coil from the Modbus device at the specified address.
member.param: The address of the coil.
When this method returns, contains the value of the coil if the read operation succeeds, or false if the read operation fails.
member.returns: True if the read operation succeeds; otherwise, false.

member.name: M:Iot.Device.Modbus.Server.ModbusDevice.TryWriteCoil(System.UInt16,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Tries to write a coil to the Modbus device at the specified address.
member.param: The address of the coil.
The value to write to the coil.
member.returns: True if the write operation succeeds; otherwise, false.

member.name: M:Iot.Device.Modbus.Server.ModbusDevice.TryReadHoldingRegister(System.UInt16,System.Int16@)
member.summary: Tries to read a holding register from the Modbus device at the specified address.
member.param: The address of the holding register.
When this method returns, contains the value of the holding register if the read operation succeeds, or zero if the read operation fails.
member.returns: True if the read operation succeeds; otherwise, false.

member.name: M:Iot.Device.Modbus.Server.ModbusDevice.TryWriteHoldingRegister(System.UInt16,System.Int16)
member.summary: Tries to write a holding register to the Modbus device at the specified address.
member.param: The address of the holding register.
The value to write to the holding register.
member.returns: True if the write operation succeeds; otherwise, false.

member.name: M:Iot.Device.Modbus.Server.ModbusDevice.BeginRead
member.summary: Method called before reading from the Modbus device.

member.name: M:Iot.Device.Modbus.Server.ModbusDevice.EndRead
member.summary: Method called after reading from the Modbus device.

member.name: M:Iot.Device.Modbus.Server.ModbusDevice.BeginWrite
member.summary: Method called before writing to the Modbus device.

member.name: M:Iot.Device.Modbus.Server.ModbusDevice.EndWrite
member.summary: Method called after writing to the Modbus device.

member.name: M:Iot.Device.Modbus.Server.ModbusDevice.GetDiscreteInput(System.UInt16,Iot.Device.Modbus.Structures.DiscreteInput@)
member.summary: Gets a discrete input from the Modbus device at the specified address.
member.param: The address of the discrete input.
When this method returns, contains the discrete input if the read operation succeeds, or null if the read operation fails.
member.returns: True if the read operation succeeds; otherwise, false.

member.name: M:Iot.Device.Modbus.Server.ModbusDevice.GetInputRegister(System.UInt16,Iot.Device.Modbus.Structures.InputRegister@)
member.summary: Gets an input register from the Modbus device at the specified address.
member.param: The address of the input register.
When this method returns, contains the input register if the read operation succeeds, or null if the read operation fails.
member.returns: True if the read operation succeeds; otherwise, false.

member.name: M:Iot.Device.Modbus.Server.ModbusDevice.GetCoil(System.UInt16,Iot.Device.Modbus.Structures.Coil@)
member.summary: Gets a coil from the Modbus device at the specified address.
member.param: The address of the coil.
When this method returns, contains the coil if the read operation succeeds, or null if the read operation fails.
member.returns: True if the read operation succeeds; otherwise, false.

member.name: M:Iot.Device.Modbus.Server.ModbusDevice.SetCoil(System.UInt16,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Sets a coil on the Modbus device at the specified address.
member.param: The address of the coil.
The value to set for the coil.
member.returns: True if the write operation succeeds; otherwise, false.

member.name: M:Iot.Device.Modbus.Server.ModbusDevice.GetHoldingRegister(System.UInt16,Iot.Device.Modbus.Structures.HoldingRegister@)
member.summary: Gets a holding register from the Modbus device at the specified address.
member.param: The address of the holding register.
When this method returns, contains the holding register if the read operation succeeds, or null if the read operation fails.
member.returns: True if the read operation succeeds; otherwise, false.

member.name: M:Iot.Device.Modbus.Server.ModbusDevice.SetHoldingRegister(System.UInt16,System.Int16)
member.summary: Sets a holding register on the Modbus device at the specified address.
member.param: The address of the holding register.
The value to set for the holding register.
member.returns: True if the write operation succeeds; otherwise, false.

member.name: M:Iot.Device.Modbus.Util.Crc16.Calculate(System.Byte[])
member.summary: Calculates the checksum (CRC16) for a 16-bit array.
member.param: The array.
member.returns: The CRC16 checksum. [0] = low byte, [1] = high byte.

member.name: M:Iot.Device.Modbus.Util.Crc16.Calculate(System.Byte[],System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Calculates the checksum (CRC16) for a 16-bit array.
member.param: The array.
Starting position.
Length.
member.returns: The CRC16 checksum. [0] = low byte, [1] = high byte.

member.name: T:Iot.Device.Modbus.Util.BoolConverter
member.summary: Provides utility methods for converting boolean values to and from Modbus-specific formats.

member.name: M:Iot.Device.Modbus.Util.BoolConverter.From(System.UInt32)
member.summary: Converts an unsigned 32-bit integer value to a boolean value.
member.param: The unsigned 32-bit integer value to convert.
member.returns: A boolean value.

member.name: M:Iot.Device.Modbus.Util.BoolConverter.From(System.Int32)
member.summary: Converts an integer value to a boolean value.
member.param: The integer value to convert.
member.returns: A boolean value.

member.name: M:Iot.Device.Modbus.Util.BoolConverter.From(System.UInt16)
member.summary: Converts an unsigned 16-bit integer to a boolean value.
member.param: The unsigned 16-bit integer to convert.
member.returns: A boolean value.

member.name: M:Iot.Device.Modbus.Util.BoolConverter.From(System.Int16)
member.summary: Converts a short value to a boolean value.
member.param: The short value to convert.
member.returns: A boolean value.

member.name: M:Iot.Device.Modbus.Util.BoolConverter.ToUInt16(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Converts a boolean value to an unsigned 16-bit integer.
member.param: The boolean value to convert.
member.returns: An unsigned 16-bit integer.

member.name: M:Iot.Device.Modbus.Util.BoolConverter.ToInt16(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Converts a boolean value to a short value.
member.param: The boolean value to convert.
member.returns: A short value.

member.name: T:Iot.Device.Modbus.Util.Int16Converter
member.summary: Provides utility methods for converting between different data types and Modbus-specific formats.

member.name: M:Iot.Device.Modbus.Util.Int16Converter.From(System.Byte[],System.Int32)
member.summary: Converts an array of bytes to an array of unsigned 16-bit integers.
member.param: The array of bytes to convert.
The number of bytes to convert. If -1, all bytes will be converted.
member.returns: An array of unsigned 16-bit integers.

member.name: M:Iot.Device.Modbus.Util.Int16Converter.ToBytes(System.UInt16[])
member.summary: Converts an array of unsigned 16-bit integers to an array of bytes.
member.param: The array of unsigned 16-bit integers to convert.
member.returns: An array of bytes.

member.name: M:Iot.Device.Modbus.Util.Int16Converter.From(System.Int32)
member.summary: Converts an integer value to an unsigned 16-bit integer.
member.param: The integer value to convert.
member.returns: An unsigned 16-bit integer.

member.name: M:Iot.Device.Modbus.Util.Int16Converter.ToInt32(System.UInt16)
member.summary: Converts an unsigned 16-bit integer to an integer value.
member.param: The unsigned 16-bit integer to convert.
member.returns: An integer value.

member.name: M:Iot.Device.Modbus.Util.Int16Converter.From(System.TimeSpan)
member.summary: Converts a value to an unsigned 16-bit integer containing the hours and minutes.
member.param: The value to convert.
member.returns: An unsigned 16-bit integer containing the hours and minutes.

member.name: M:Iot.Device.Modbus.Util.Int16Converter.ToTime(System.UInt16)
member.summary: Converts an unsigned 16-bit integer containing the hours and minutes to a value.
member.param: The unsigned 16-bit integer containing the hours and minutes to convert.
member.returns: A value.

member.name: M:Iot.Device.Modbus.Util.Int16Converter.From(System.DateTime)
member.summary: Converts a value to an array of unsigned 16-bit integers.
member.param: The value to convert.
member.returns: An array of unsigned 16-bit integers.

member.name: M:Iot.Device.Modbus.Util.Int16Converter.ToDateTime(System.UInt16[])
member.summary: Converts an array of unsigned 16-bit integers to a value.
member.param: The array of unsigned 16-bit integers to convert.
member.returns: A value.

member.name: M:Iot.Device.Modbus.Util.Int16Converter.From(System.String,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Converts a string to an array of unsigned 16-bit integers.
member.param: The string to convert.
The starting position in the string.
The number of characters to convert. If -1, all characters from the starting position will be converted.
member.returns: An array of unsigned 16-bit integers.

member.name: M:Iot.Device.Modbus.Util.Int16Converter.ToString(System.UInt16[])
member.summary: Converts an array of unsigned 16-bit integers to a string.
member.param: The array of unsigned 16-bit integers to convert.
member.returns: A string.

member.name: T:System.ByteExtension
member.summary: Provides extension methods for the class.

member.name: M:System.ByteExtension.JudgReverse(System.Byte[])
member.summary: Reverses the order of bytes in the specified byte array.
member.param: The byte array to reverse.
